name: ccusage
description: Analyze coding (agent) CLI token usage and costs from local data
author: ryoppippi

scripts.build: pnpm run generate:schema && tsdown && pnpm run build:rust
scripts.prerelease: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
scripts.test:statusline: cat test/statusline-test.json | cargo run --bin ccusage -- statusline
scripts.test:statusline:all: echo 'Testing Sonnet 4:' && pnpm run test:statusline:sonnet4 && echo 'Testing Opus 4.1:' && pnpm run test:statusline:opus4 && echo 'Testing Sonnet 4.1:' && pnpm run test:statusline:sonnet41
scripts.test:statusline:opus4: cat test/statusline-test-opus4.json | cargo run --bin ccusage -- statusline --offline
scripts.test:statusline:sonnet4: cat test/statusline-test-sonnet4.json | cargo run --bin ccusage -- statusline --offline
scripts.test:statusline:sonnet41: cat test/statusline-test-sonnet41.json | cargo run --bin ccusage -- statusline --offline
